overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character walking through a field of white flowers toward a snow-capped mountain during sunset, transitioning through dusk into night as they approach the Shimotsu River.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense white flower field with mountain vista

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily through chest-high white flowers toward the distant snow-capped mountain

entered.detail: dense field of white flowers surrounding the character
large snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon, resembling Mount Fuji
dark forested hills flanking the mountain on the left
warm orange and pink sunset sky with scattered clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense field of white flowers during golden hour, with a majestic snow-capped mountain framed against an orange sunset sky ahead. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves through the chest-high blooms.

events.description: exits the dense white flower field into open grassy meadow with a reflective lake visible on the right
sun sets below the horizon, causing ambient light to drop significantly as night begins to fall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through grassy terrain as daylight fades, approaching the tree line

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the fading sunset light
clusters of purple flowers scattered in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the white flowers into an open grassy meadow with a reflective lake on the right. As the sun sets, the lighting shifts from warm golden hour to cool twilight, and patches of purple flowers become visible in the grass.

events.description: location text 'SHIMOTSU RIVER' appears on screen, indicating arrival at the river

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass and purple flowers in near-darkness, approaching the river

entered.detail: wide river becoming visible in the distance, marked by on-screen text
dark blue night sky with remaining orange clouds on the horizon
line of trees marking the riverbank on the right side

segments.scene_description: Night has fallen as the character continues through the meadow, with the Shimotsu River now visible ahead. The white flowers have given way to purple blooms on the left, while trees line the right bank of the river under a darkening sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark riverside path with tree line

agents.ego_description: continuing along the river path in complete darkness, passing dense trees on the right

entered.detail: thick cluster of trees forming a dark forest edge along the river

segments.scene_description: In full darkness, the character walks along the riverside with dense trees now prominent on the right. The purple flowers continue to line the left side of the path as the mountain fades into the night sky, and the river becomes a dark presence in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a floral landscape that transforms from a golden sunset vista into a dark, riverside night. It begins with the character walking through a dense field of chest-high white flowers, moving toward a majestic snow-capped mountain framed by an orange sky. As the character emerges into an open grassy meadow, the warm golden light shifts into a cool twilight, revealing a reflective lake and patches of purple blooms. The scene then transitions into night as the white flowers give way to purple ones on the left and the Shimotsu River appears ahead, flanked by trees on the right bank. Finally, the camera follows the character into full darkness along the riverside, where the mountain fades from view and the river becomes a dark presence under a black sky.
